title: System for degassing a package
abstract: System (34) and method for degassing a package. The package (36) includes a packaging film (38) enclosing an inner space (40) and a substantially rigid element (1) connected to the packaging film along a circumferential sealing contour. The element has an opening (4) within the contour for allowing gas to enter or leave the inner space and a sealing surface (6) surrounding the opening. A lid (8) is arranged and an actuator (28) is provided for selectively moving the lid from a first to a second position. In the first position the lid is offset relative to the sealing surface so as to allow gas to enter or leave the inner space. In the second position the lid sealingly abuts against the sealing surface for closing the opening. With the lid in the first position the inner space is degassed. The opening is closed by operating the actuator so as to move the lid into the second position.
